These '''combat droids''' were made in the factories of the [[Kol Huro system/Legends|Kol Huro system]].

==Characteristics==
The Kol Huro combat droids were equipped with so many weapons that they could not move. They were noted to be universal.

==History==
They were built for [[Mustag Olus]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

In [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]], [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] smuggled them past [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] customs and had them stored at minimum power level, removing their core intelligence and encasing them "alive" in transparent cubes in his underground museum.

{{Droid-stub}}
